# Reference Fixture Version Information
# Version: 2.2.0
# Generated: 2026-05-30T17:00:00.000000Z
# Method: OpenSCAD self-test mode
# OpenSCAD: OpenSCAD version 2026.01.03
# Total fixtures: 14
# Failed: 0

# Version 2.2.0 Changes:
# - Metadata-only top-level version bump for the v2.2.0 release.
# - The 11 original fixtures from v2.1.0 are UNCHANGED (same sha256).
# - Phase 7b added 3 new fixtures (no other regeneration in Phase 8):
#     * cylinder_rounded_emboss_multiline (Line_1/Line_2/Line_3, 0.4mm preset)
#     * cylinder_rounded_emboss_03mm (0.3mm preset, rounded emboss)
#     * cylinder_rounded_counter_03mm (0.3mm preset, rounded counter)
# - v2.2.0 also ships aggressive customizer polish (file rename,
#   preset routing extracted to presets.scad, named geometry
#   constants, $fn policy doc) and expanded tests (preset /
#   backward-compat / text-too-long suites, slider-range validator).

# Version 2.1.0 Changes:
# - Paper thickness preset system added (0.4mm / 0.3mm / Custom)
# - Defaults updated to match web app 0.4mm preset
# - All fixtures regenerated with new default values

# Phase 7b additions (2026-05-30, total went 11 -> 14):
# - cylinder_rounded_emboss_multiline: 3-line short text under the 0.4mm preset
# - cylinder_rounded_emboss_03mm: 0.3mm preset on the rounded emboss path
# - cylinder_rounded_counter_03mm: 0.3mm preset on the rounded counter path
